resources.name: Site Logo
resources.prompt: Minimal logo for 'ChatGPT Image', an AI image generation web app. Abstract geometric icon suggesting image creation — a stylized frame or pixel grid with a subtle gradient spark or light effect. Clean modern design, blue-purple gradient (#7c5cfc to #38bdf8), transparent background, simple icon, no text, vector-style, square format 512x512.

resources.prompt: Open graph social preview image 1200x630 for 'ChatGPT Image 2.0 AI Image Generator' page. Dark background with purple gradient. Shows a stylized prompt input interface on the left ('A futuristic city at sunset...') and a generated image preview on the right. Headline 'ChatGPT Image 2.0 Generator'. Clean SaaS UI aesthetic.

resources.name: OG Image — Home
resources.prompt: Open graph social preview image 1200x630 for 'ChatGPT Image 2.0 Generator' homepage. Dark background (#0a0a0f) with blue-purple gradient glow.
